name: lark-deck-cyrus
description: End-to-end Cyrus/Lark H5 pitch deck system: plan, render, audit, rehearse, and package customer-ready decks.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, render, audit, and rehearse H5 pitch decks.
interface.longDescription: Turn customer briefs, sales ideas, and raw materials into talk-ready Lark/Feishu-style HTML pitch decks through planner, renderer, auditor, and pitch rehearsal skills.
defaultPrompt: Use lark-deck-cyrus to create a customer pitch deck.
Use deck-auditor to check whether this H5 deck is ready.
Use pitch-simulator to rehearse this deck with the audience.
